meta.title: Vasu Garg — Senior Frontend Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Vasu Garg, a Senior Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable, user-friendly web applications.

profile.name: Vasu Garg
profile.title: Senior Frontend Developer
profile.tagline: I build fast, beautiful & scalable web experiences.
profile.bio: Senior Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience crafting scalable, user-friendly web applications. I care deeply about performance, clean code, and interfaces that just feel right.
profile.bio2: When I'm not pushing pixels, I'm exploring anime ⛩️ or games 🎮, building side projects, or learning something new on the internet.

highlights: Led design & delivery of responsive, scalable web apps with React.js & TypeScript — 99.9% uptime, 5K+ MAU.
Built a shared component library cutting development effort by 35%.
Boosted app performance by 40% via code-splitting, lazy loading & state optimization.
Maintained 100% CI/CD pipeline compliance through Git/GitHub best practices.
Delivered cross-platform UIs in Angular & React.js across 8+ major product launches.
Connected frontend to RESTful APIs and AI-driven services with 99% response accuracy.
Cut UI bug backlog by 40% over two quarters through systematic debugging.
Improved maintainability & lowered post-release issues by 25% via enforced Git workflows.

projects.name: eKYC Platform
projects.description: A scalable multi-vendor eKYC platform with live UI updates via Firebase Remote Config, an admin dashboard for KYC status tracking, and integrations with DigiLocker & Digio for automated document retrieval and eSigning.
highlights: Reduced processing time by 35%, improved agent efficiency by 25%
Automated manual workload by 60% via DigiLocker & Digio SDKs
80% increase in user satisfaction & faster customer onboarding

projects.name: uAlgos — Algo Trading Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered algorithmic trading platform featuring a chat-based strategy builder, backtesting system with 85%+ accuracy, AI-driven stock screener, and company analytics dashboard.
highlights: Reduced strategy design time by 40%
Improved screening speed by 30%, boosted user adoption by 25%
Resolved 60+ bugs cutting issue resolution time by 40%

projects.name: Cove Drive — Encrypted Cloud Storage
projects.description: A zero-knowledge cloud storage system with AES + RSA client-side encryption, password-protected file sharing, multi-format in-app preview, and Google Analytics integration.
highlights: Zero-knowledge architecture — files encrypted before leaving the client
25% increase in user retention over 6 months
Supports multiple file types with in-app preview

projects.name: Sekai
projects.description: An anime bookmarker and watchlist app powered by the AniList GraphQL API. Track what you're watching, discover new series, and manage your anime journey beautifully.
highlights: Integrates with AniList GraphQL API for live anime data
Full watchlist management — track, bookmark & discover
Clean, responsive UI built for anime fans

projects.name: React Lab
projects.description: A showcase of 12+ mini applications built with React, TypeScript & Node.js — demonstrating a wide range of frontend patterns, UI components, and full-stack integrations.
highlights: 12+ apps covering diverse use cases and patterns
Built with React, TypeScript & MERN stack
Each app is self-contained with its own state & logic

education.institution: Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology
